title: "California Offshore Wind Energy & Jobs Act" and "Safe and Supportive Schools Act" will address climate change and safety in schools

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act aims to facilitate and expedite offshore wind energy projects necessary to combat climate change.",
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act will clarify the authority of California governmental agencies related to wind energy projects along the California Coast.",
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act requires expedited procedures for offshore wind energy projects.",
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act specifies criteria for the selection of port and transmission alternatives related to offshore wind energy projects.",
    "The criteria under the California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act will ensure that the environment and sensitive habitats are protected.",
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act aims to create and retain thousands of high paying jobs in California.",
    "The California Offshore Wind Energy and Jobs Act seeks to advance environmental justice and improve the lives of all Californians.",
    "The Safe and Supportive Schools Act will equip teachers and school staff with tools and training to support LGBTQ+ students.",
    "The implementation of LGBTQ+ cultural competency training for teachers in California schools is specified in the Safe and Supportive Schools Act.",
    "Improving schools is part of the strategy to reduce high dropout rates that lead to homelessness, poverty, and health disparities for the LGBTQ+ community."
  ]
}
```
